title: NIT Calicut Notification 2026 - Apply for Senior Project Associate Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has declared the latest notification for the recruitment of various Senior Project Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, or Ph.D can use this chance and apply for the NIT Calicut Notification 2026 . Here we have included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list...
